tasks.title: Competitor Intelligence: Butter + Vindicia Analysis
tasks.summary: Deep analysis of Butter's Payments Score ($29M funded, 8-10% above legacy) and Vindicia crypto integration. Bottom line: neither has anything close to RTN. Butter's Score is merchant-side prediction without issuer data. Vindicia riding distribution, not innovating. Tuhk remains the real threat. Product insight: RTN-powered pre-auth approval likelihood score could leapfrog Butter's Score.
tasks.source: Mar 5 Leadership Standup + web research + competitive analysis
